label: Mutant count
description: A starting pawn count entry that specifies a mutant type. Used in ScenPart_ConfigPage_ConfigureStartingPawns_Mutants to define how many pawns of each mutant type are generated.

mutant.label: Mutant
mutant.description: MutantDef used when generating pawns for this entry.

allowedDevelopmentalStages.label: Allowed developmental stages
allowedDevelopmentalStages.description: Developmental stages allowed for pawns generated from this entry. Defaults to Baby, Child, and Adult.

description.label: Description
description.description: Optional custom label for this mutant count entry, used in the UI instead of the mutant label. Translated.
